info.english_meaning: to grindto powderto crush to kill to destroy

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'kareRa yena prApanazwi kuYjarAnna tena siMho maSakAn prabADate' (paYcata॰1.226) praSabdaH prakarze saYcUrRayati na tvavacUrRayati
'sampizwadagDaviDvastaM tava sEnyaM kirIwinA' (BA॰karRa॰80.19) samSabdaH pezaRasya sampUrRatAmAha api vA sampUrRatAyA DAtvarTenEvopasaNgrahAdanarTakaH
'nizpipezorasA kAMScit kAMScit padByAm' (rA0 68423) tAqaM tAqaM DvaMsayAmAsetyarTaH
'vinizpipeza cAtmAnaM pragfhya suBujA BujO' (rA0 4219) vinizpipeza saMcUrRayAmAsa
'yadA''pipeza mAtaraM putraH pramudito Dayan' (vA0 saM0 1911) Apipeza Izat pinazwi kziRoti
'taM pARinApeza boDayAYcakAra' (Sa0 brA0 145115) pARinApezam pARiByAM nipOqya
'BImabAhubalotpizwe vinazwe rAkzase tataH' (BA0 vana0 1173) utpizwe balavad bADite upapIqite saMcUrRite
'varuRo ha vE somasya rAjYo'mIvAkzi pratipipeza tadaSvayat' (Sa0 brA0 42111) pratipipeza tAqayAmAsa prajahAra
'sPuratAM pratipizwAnAmaSvAnAM SIGragAminAm…SabdaSca tumulaH samapadyata' (BA0 Salya0 2374) pratipizwAnAM saMGfzwAnAm prativizwAnAmiti pAWAntaram
